Operation 'getAuthToken' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks critical input details (what credentials are required), output details (token structure and usage), and side effects (token expiration, how to use tokens). Enhanced description explains the grant flow, token types, their purposes, and how to use the access token for subsequent requests, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Obtain an access token via OpenID Connect
data.current_description: Authenticates using direct access grant flow and returns JWT access, refresh, and ID tokens.
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user via OpenID Connect direct access grant flow using provided credentials. Returns a TokenResponse object containing JWT access token (for API authorization), refresh token (for obtaining new access tokens), and ID token (for user identity information). The access token should be used in subsequent API requests via Bearer authentication. Tokens have expiration times specified in the response.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks critical input details (what credentials are required), output details (token structure and usage), and side effects (token expiration, how to use tokens). Enhanced description explains the grant flow, token types, their purposes, and how to use the access token for subsequent requests, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listOpenApiSpecs' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks output details about the response structure and context about how to use the returned data. Enhanced description clarifies the response format (map structure), references the schema type (OpenApiSpecList), and explains the relationship to the getOpenApiSpec operation, enabling AI agents to understand the data structure and next steps.

data.current_description: Returns a JSON object listing all available API specification paths and their URLs.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a map of all available API group paths to their OpenAPI v3 specification URLs. Returns an OpenApiSpecList object where keys are API group paths and values are URLs to fetch the corresponding specification documents. Use the returned URLs with the getOpenApiSpec operation to retrieve full specification details for specific API versions.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks output details about the response structure and context about how to use the returned data. Enhanced description clarifies the response format (map structure), references the schema type (OpenApiSpecList), and explains the relationship to the getOpenApiSpec operation, enabling AI agents to understand the data structure and next steps.

data.current_description: Retrieves the OpenAPI v3 specification for a specific application and version.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete OpenAPI v3 specification document for a specified application and version. Requires two path parameters: appName (the API group identifier) and version (the API version). Returns an OpenApiSpecDocument containing the full specification including endpoints, schemas, security requirements, and operation details. Use this specification to understand available operations and their requirements for the target API.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks input details (parameter names and purposes) and output details (what the specification contains and how to use it).
